description: §22 E-META-EVAL-002 — a `^{}` block whose compile-time eval SUCCEEDS (`emit("<div")` runs without throwing) but the emitted string is an unclosed markup tag that fails to re-parse. meta-eval.ts feeds the emitted output back through the native parser (reparseEmitted); the unclosed `<div` tag fails re-parsing, so it fires E-META-EVAL-002 (re-parsing emitted meta code failed) and NOT E-META-EVAL-001 (the eval itself did not throw).
